items.title: HALO Stock Up on Q2 Earnings and Revenue Beat, Raised 2025 View
items.description: Halozyme jumps 5.3% on second-quarter earnings and revenue beat, fueled by strong royalty growth, and a raised 2025 outlook.

items.title: Why Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) is a Top Dividend Stock for Your Portfolio
items.description: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) have what it takes? Let's find out.
